name: Garlic Marinara
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tomatoes and chop them.
2. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the crushed garlic and cook for one minute or until golden in color. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan with the remaining garlic and cook for 4 minutes.
5. Stir in the oregano and parsley.
6. Cook for an additional minute, then serve.
